text: TSA workers miss a full paycheck, while travelers keep paying airport security fees - NPR
fullText: Many TSA workers received no money in their paychecks Friday as the partial DHS shutdown drags on. Fees paid by airline passengers keep piling up, even as airport security officers work without pay.
